title: PalmClaw: A Native On-Device Agent Framework for Mobile Phones
innovation_summary: PalmClaw: A Native On-Device Agent Framework for Mobile Phones: We present PalmClaw, an open-source agent framework that runs natively on mobile phones and manages the sessions, memory, skills, tools, and agent loop directly on the.
